Jane Doe
Senior Software Engineer
jane@doe.dev · linkedin.com/in/jane · Berlin, DE
Summary

Engineer with 8+ years building distributed systems at scale. Led migration that cut p99 latency 62% and saved $1.4M / yr.

Experience
Staff Engineer — Acme
  • Architected event-driven platform serving 4B events/day.
  • Mentored 6 engineers; 2 promoted to senior in 12 months.
  • Reduced infra spend 38% via autoscaling redesign.
Path 01Open

Upload & improve

Drop a PDF or DOCX. AI extracts your details, fills the editor, and scores your resume against ATS criteria.

Path 02Open

Start from scratch

Pick a clean, ATS-safe template. Write rough drafts — AI rewrites them into professional, keyword-optimized copy.

What's inside

AI rewriting

Turn rough drafts into resume-grade prose with one click.

ATS scoring

Compatibility, readability, keyword and professionalism scores.

Smart parsing

Upload PDF or DOCX and auto-fill every section.

Clean export

Single-column, selectable-text PDF + DOCX downloads.
